problem id: 9bd65991
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  01100011 -> 10000011
  11101011 -> 10000111
  00100010 -> 00000001
  00110001 -> 10000001
  11000011 -> 10000110
  00100101 -> 10000001
  11111010 -> 00000111
  10000011 -> 10000100
  00111100 -> 00000001
  01111100 -> 00000011

query: 10111010
predicted answer: 00000101
